bead.title: Stage 4.11: Graph page — D3 Svelte island (LARGE)
bead.description: New files: src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/graph/+page.svelte, src/lib/components/D3Graph.svelte. Reimplement the D3 force-simulation fresh (not a port). Drag, zoom, hover tooltips. Data from docGraph query. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 4 bead #45.
bead.acceptance: (1) MANUAL: load the graph page, see a D3 force-directed graph render. (2) Drag nodes — simulation responds. (3) Zoom in/out. (4) Hover for tooltips showing node metadata. (5) Screenshot or describe the interactive behavior in the completion note.
